document.id: Laws of Md., ch. 485 (2026 Session Md. Gen. Assembly)
document.heading: Baltimore City – Ordinance Enforcement – Fines and Penalties
An Act Concerning Baltimore City – Ordinance Enforcement – Fines and Penalties

section.heading: Fines and penalties.
section.text: To provide civil and criminal fines and penalties for the violation of any ordinance, rule or regulations established by the City under or in the execution of any power granted by this Article II; provided that no imprisonment shall be for a longer period than 12 months.
